title: Baby Handprint and Footprint XL Size Kit,2 Blue Baby Handprint Ink Pads with Clean-Touch & 6 Imprint Cards,Inkless Print Kit Safe Non-Toxic for Baby Feet and Hands, Family Keepsake, Pet Paw
features: 🖐️👣A Wonderful Baby Gift 🐾- Capture and cherish your new baby’s precious little handprint or footprint during the first year with our Zemiu clean touch ink pads. An excellent choice to remember these traces of our baby, it is very original and a beautiful memory.

🖐️👣Product Information🐾- Ink area per ink pad is 12.5 x 8 cm, suitable for babies 0-18 months old or small to Large sized dogs; Includes 2 clean-touch ink pads and 6 imprint cards,gift box; Each Ink pad can be used for 3-4 times use maximum.

🖐️👣100% Safe Ink Pads🐾- Easily copy your baby's precious hand and footprints with our new ink pad guaranteeing that baby's skin never touches ink, no mess and easy to use ink pad achieve a highly detailed print in non-toxic and 100% baby safe ink

🖐️👣Easy to Use🐾- 3 steps easy copy your babay's handprints and footprints in minutes. This clean-touch pink ink pad ensures baby’s skin never touched ink! Makes a great baby shower gift for creating newborn baby keepsakes.

🖐️👣Special DIY Souvenir Gift🐾-The cutest thing decorates your baby's room. This baby hand and footprints kit is an excellent gift for Mother's Day, a baby shower gift or a gift for new parents, grandparents.Also suitable for copy your pets footprints.
description: Product Description Here are some tips for you to better use this handprints and footprints ink pad: A. For Baby Handprint and Footprint: -Simply use the inkless side of the ink pad to make the handprints/footprints and the ink will not left on the skin. -You can practice making impressions by wetting your baby hand or foot with water on a plain piece of paper. -The difficulty depends on how much your baby moves, and it's better if you do it when he/she is calm, or maybe when your baby is asleep. -Each ink pad can be use for about 2-3 times,please follow the steps to make the prints. Here are some tips for you to better use this handprints and footprints ink pad: B.For Dog/Cat Paw Prints: -If you want to make the paw prints for your cats/dogs, we suggest to wipe the paw clean, cut the foot hair off your pet, it will help you to make perfect footprints，therwise the paw print will be very faint.

specifications_table.Occasion: newborns, baby keepsake, baby shower gift, baby party gift
